subject: grx017_material_sorting_telemetry_sample
evidence_kind_note: Measured sampling telemetry collected once from the GRX-005 bench project material_variants scene. This is NOT an evidence-gate document: it feeds no CI gate, flips no manifest field, and makes no FPS/p95/GPU-timestamp/performance claim. GRX-017 stays telemetry-only (GRX_PLAN: telemetry first).

godot_exe.note: Scratch Godot build binaries are NOT committed; the sidecar target/grx/godot-scratch-0026.source_provenance.json (local) audited tracked_patch_stack_only=true at build time.

settings.enabled_via: override.cfg (default false; the shipping config never enables it)

marker: RXGD_MATERIAL_SORTING_TELEMETRY (verbose channel, one line per 30 frames)

field_semantics.frame: telemetry frame counter at emission (counts frames with the OPAQUE list sort)
field_semantics.sort_usec: wall time of THIS frames render_list[RENDER_LIST_OPAQUE].sort_by_key() (OS::get_ticks_usec delta)
field_semantics.element_count: THIS frames opaque render list length at sort time
field_semantics.pso_switches_interval: draw_list_bind_render_pipeline rebinds counted in the PASS_MODE_COLOR _render_list_template branches, accumulated across the 30-frame interval window (trailing skew up to one frame, declared)
field_semantics.material_uniform_set_switches_interval: material_uniform_set switch branch count, same window/caliber as pso_switches_interval
